description: Modules for interacting with cloud storage and service APIs.

modules.name: google-drive-utils
modules.description: A set of utilities to interact with the Google Drive API for file listing and management using Google Identity Services.

functions.name: googleDriveService.init
functions.description: Initializes the Google API client. Must be called once with your Google Client ID.

functions.name: googleDriveService.signIn
functions.description: Prompts the user to sign in and authorize the app. Returns a promise that resolves with the access token.

functions.name: googleDriveService.signOut
functions.description: Signs the user out and revokes the access token.

functions.name: googleDriveService.isSignedIn
functions.description: Checks if the user is currently signed in.

functions.name: googleDriveService.listFiles
functions.description: Lists files from the user's Drive. Can be filtered by a query string.

functions.name: googleDriveService.uploadFile
functions.description: Uploads a local file to Google Drive.

functions.name: googleDriveService.deleteFile
functions.description: Permanently deletes a file by its ID.
